'''竏嗟-ng-z-b''' ('''kalangzeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbenumb|unbenumb]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ng-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbenumb|unbenumb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗟-ng-z-b
|-
! Lemma
| kalangzeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilangzeboko|thilangzeboko]] || [[word:jilangzeboko|jilangzeboko]] || [[word:shilangzeboko|shilangzeboko]] || [[word:kilangzeboko|kilangzeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulangzeboko|thuthulangzeboko]] || [[word:jujulangzeboko|jujulangzeboko]] || [[word:shushulangzeboko|shushulangzeboko]] || [[word:kukulangzeboko|kukulangzeboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholangzeboko|tholangzeboko]] || [[word:jolangzeboko|jolangzeboko]] || [[word:sholangzeboko|sholangzeboko]] || [[word:kolangzeboko|kolangzeboko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalangzeboko|thalangzeboko]] || [[word:jalangzeboko|jalangzeboko]] || [[word:shalangzeboko|shalangzeboko]] || [[word:kalangzeboko|kalangzeboko]]
|-

|}
